rule_metadata.author: Dimitrios Slamaris, @atc_project (fix)
rule_metadata.title: DHCP Server Error Failed Loading the CallOut DLL

rules.rule_text:
title: DHCP Server Error Failed Loading the CallOut DLL
id: 75edd3fd-7146-48e5-9848-3013d7f0282c
status: test
description: This rule detects a DHCP server error in which a specified Callout DLL
  (in registry) could not be loaded
references:
- https://blog.3or.de/mimilib-dhcp-server-callout-dll-injection.html
- https://technet.microsoft.com/en-us/library/cc726884(v=ws.10).aspx
- https://msdn.microsoft.com/de-de/library/windows/desktop/aa363389(v=vs.85).aspx
author: Dimitrios Slamaris, @atc_project (fix)
date: 2017-05-15
modified: 2022-12-25
tags:
- attack.privilege-escalation
- attack.persistence
- attack.defense-evasion
- attack.t1574.001
logsource:
  product: windows
  service: system
detection:
  selection:
    EventID:
    - 1031
    - 1032
    - 1034
    Provider_Name: Microsoft-Windows-DHCP-Server
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: high
